name: Pineapple Sour Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. For the crust: Combine crumbs, melted margarine, and sugar in a bowl; blend well with a fork. Spoon the crumb mixture into a 9-inch pie pan. Place an 8-inch pie pan on top and press to create an even crumb layer. Remove the 8-inch pie pan. Bake at 375°F for 8 minutes if desired, or use as is.
2. Combine sugar, flour, and salt in a medium saucepan. Stir in pineapple, sour cream, and lemon juice; cook over medium heat, stirring until the mixture comes to a boil. Cook for 2 minutes. Stir half of the cooked mixture into the beaten yolks; return the filling/egg yolk mixture to the remaining filling. Cook for 2 more minutes, stirring constantly. Cool slightly. Spoon the filling into the crust.
3. Make the meringue by beating egg whites with cream of tartar until soft peaks form. Gradually add sugar, beating until stiff peaks form. Spread over the pie filling; seal edges. Bake at 350°F for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown.
